testcase.name: test_login_with_invalid_credentials_returns_401

failure.message: AssertionError: Expected 401 or 500, got 520 assert 520 in [401, 500] + where 520 = <Response [520]>.status_code

testcase.failure: tests/test_api_endpoints.py:45: in test_login_with_invalid_credentials_returns_401 assert response.status_code in [401, 500], f"Expected 401 or 500, got {response.status_code}" E AssertionError: Expected 401 or 500, got 520 E assert 520 in [401, 500] E + where 520 = <Response [520]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_login_with_empty_username_validation

failure.message: AssertionError: Expected error status, got 520 assert 520 in [401, 422, 500] + where 520 = <Response [520]>.status_code

testcase.failure: tests/test_api_endpoints.py:56: in test_login_with_empty_username_validation assert response.status_code in [401, 422, 500], f"Expected error status, got {response.status_code}" E AssertionError: Expected error status, got 520 E assert 520 in [401, 422, 500] E + where 520 = <Response [520]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_login_with_empty_password_validation

failure.message: AssertionError: Expected error status, got 520 assert 520 in [401, 422, 500] + where 520 = <Response [520]>.status_code
